# Imagine Prompt Lab

Independent multilingual Grok AI resource.

Canonical: https://xianyu110.github.io/grok-imagine-prompt-generator/
Languages: en-US, zh-CN, ja
Primary CTA: https://trygrokai.asia/list/

Key pages:
- English: https://xianyu110.github.io/grok-imagine-prompt-generator/
- Chinese: https://xianyu110.github.io/grok-imagine-prompt-generator/zh-cn/
- Japanese: https://xianyu110.github.io/grok-imagine-prompt-generator/ja/
